LogContextInfos.description: Context information for the downloaded logs, used for downloading by log context.

ContextFlow.description: LogGroup ID to which the log context belongs.

PackageOffset.description: Specifies the log index in the LogGroup.

description: Log download task, used to export log data retrieved from a log topic as a file for user download.

AllowIncomplete.description: Whether to allow approximate results when the query statement cannot be calculated precisely.

Compression.description: Compression format of the exported file. none: no compression. Recommended only for small data volumes. gzip: compress using gzip format. ip: compress using ip format.

DataFormat.description: Exported file format. Supported values: csv: CSV format. json: JSON format. jsonl: JSONL format.

EndTime.description: Query end time, accurate to the millisecond. Unix timestamp format, representing the number of milliseconds since 1970-1-1 00:00:00 UTC.

Limit.description: Number of original log entries downloaded, or number of rows in the analysis result.

LogContextInfos.description: Download the log information required for context queries, including the source host, LogGroup ID, and the log's sequence number within the LogGroup. Set this parameter when TaskType is 2.

LogCount.description: Number of log entries included in the download task.

LogSize.description: Total size of logs included in the download task, in bytes.

MustComplete.description: Whether to use fully accurate query results for download. true: use fully accurate query results to ensure the downloaded log data exactly matches the query conditions. false: full accuracy is not required; allows downloading log data that may not exactly match the query conditions.

Query.description: Query statement for analysis, with a maximum length of 4 KiB.

Sort.description: Log sorting order when only retrieving without analysis. asc: ascending. desc: descending.

StartTime.description: Query start time, accurate to the millisecond. Unix timestamp format, representing the number of milliseconds since 1970-1-1 00:00:00 UTC.

TaskName.description: Download task name. Length range: 1–63 characters.

TaskStatus.description: Download task status, indicating the generation status of the log archive file. Includes: creating: file is being generated. created_cut: file has been partially generated. success: file has been generated. wait: waiting. fail: failed.

TaskType.description: Type of logs to download. 0: download search-type logs. 1: download analysis-type logs. 2: download context-type logs.

TopicId.description: Log topic ID to which the download task belongs.
